description_long: This is a large, boxy food truck with a predominantly white exterior, featuring blue wave graphics and a prominent red and white 'Pescheria Bonato' logo on both sides. The truck has a cab-over design with a compact front, large windshield, and side mirrors, typical of European delivery vehicles. The sides of the truck are decorated with ocean-themed illustrations and Italian text, suggesting a seafood or maritime food focus. The rear of the truck displays additional branding and what appear to be access doors, likely for loading or kitchen entry. The vehicle has six wheels, with dual rear axles for supporting heavy loads. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, with no visible service window or serving counter on the exterior.
description: A large, white food truck with blue wave graphics and 'Pescheria Bonato' branding, featuring a modern, boxy design and six wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, blue wave graphics, and the 'Pescheria Bonato' logo with Italian text.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the cab, windshield, headlights, and grille, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the same graphics and logo, emphasizing the truck's length and dual rear axles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing access doors, additional branding, and safety markings, with no visible service window.
attribute_signage: Red and white 'Pescheria Bonato' logo, blue wave graphics, and Italian text 'I migliori prodotti del mare' on both sides and rear.
